text_excerpt: In Parliament | Matt Vickers Skip to main content Matt Vickers MP MP for Stockton West Main navigation Home About Matt Get in touch News In Parliament Getting Things Done Volunteer Matt Vickers MP MP for Stockton West In Parliament Tweet Here, you can see Matt's latest speeches and appearances in Parliament (provided by theyworkforyou): Rescue Services: Culture and Sports | Department of Health and Social Care | Written Answers To ask the Secretary of State for Health and Social Care, what assessment he has made of the impact of the proposed amendments to the Health Fire and Rescue Services: Funding | Westminster Hall debates I beg to move, That this House has considered funding for fire and rescue services. Fire and Rescue Services: Funding | Westminster Hall debates Certainly there are the pressures of the summer and the consequences for rural communities. Fire and Rescue Services: Funding | Westminster Hall debates The hon. Gentleman has the pleasure of representing a beautiful part of the world. Fire and Rescue Services: Funding | Westminster Hall debates I could not agree more. More than ever, we are seeing fire services that are lean and efficient, having undergone all sorts of savings. Fire and Rescue Services: Funding | Westminster Hall debates First, we have to see central Government funding in place to ensure that we can run safe and effective fire services. Fire and Rescue Services: Funding | Westminster Hall debates I could not agree more. As the Fire Brigades Union puts it, these cuts are putting lives at risk. Fire and Rescue Services: Funding | Westminster Hall debates A lot of fire services across the country are facing huge challenges. Fire and Rescue Services: Funding | Westminster Hall debates It is hugely important that firefighters and communities are involved in those discussions, so that we can get the structure that works best Fire and Rescue Services: Funding | Westminster Hall debates I will make a little progress. The Government’s latest settlement takes things a step too far.
